gaps.requirement_ref: REQ-004 (24 months, filterable by date and type)
gaps.description: Business requested at least 24 months of account history with date and type filtering. Engineering planned a 12-month default with load-more, and did not mention filtering.
gaps.suggested_action: Confirm retention policy and extend the history view to 24 months with date/type filters.

gaps.description: The business explicitly called out GDPR compliance, but no privacy, consent, or EU data handling plan was discussed.
gaps.suggested_action: Add GDPR requirements to the implementation plan, including data processing, retention, and access controls.

gaps.description: Admins need cross-account visibility and user impersonation, but engineering did not discuss either capability.
gaps.suggested_action: Define admin access flows and impersonation safeguards before implementation.

gaps.description: Business needs monthly, annual, and potentially custom billing schedules, but engineering hardcoded a 30-day cycle.
gaps.suggested_action: Replace the fixed cron-based cycle with configurable billing rules per client.

gaps.requirement_ref: Automated invoicing and invoice email delivery
gaps.description: Engineering mentioned invoice storage and email after generation, but did not define the invoice generation flow or reconciliation behavior.
gaps.suggested_action: Specify invoice creation, delivery, and payment-to-invoice reconciliation in the billing design.

gaps.requirement_ref: Real-time response time statistics by agent and ticket tier
gaps.solution_ref: Open ticket count and closed tickets by day
gaps.description: The business asked for live response-time metrics broken down by agent and tier, but engineering only planned simple volume summaries.
gaps.suggested_action: Add event tracking and metric aggregation for agent-level response and resolution times.

gaps.description: The business mentioned trend visibility and possible export support, but engineering did not include either.
gaps.suggested_action: Confirm whether trend charts and data export are required for the first release or deferred.

gaps.description: The business requires region-local data storage, but engineering chose a single US region with shared storage for all users.
gaps.suggested_action: Design a regional storage strategy that keeps APAC customer data in-region.

gaps.requirement_ref: Fast user experience in US and APAC
gaps.description: Engineering optimized for US-only infrastructure, which may not satisfy the stated latency expectations for APAC users.
gaps.suggested_action: Validate latency targets and evaluate multi-region deployment or regional edge handling.
